item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 12min Per @WSJ , Jon Rahm’s caddie Adam Hayes has listed his North Carolina home for n
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 12min Per @WSJ , Jon Rahm’s caddie Adam Hayes has listed his North Carolina home for nearly $14M. Home sits on nearly 100 acres De House Tracker 3 2 9 1 mil

item.title: JNucci23: Alan Shipnuck reposteó John Nucci @JNucci23 · 42min "How many times do you think we were approached to do our own thing?
KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 13min The difference a week makes. 3 8 85 5 mil
item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 13min The difference a week makes. 3 8 85 5 mil

item.title: GolfweekNichols: Josh Carpenter reposteó Beth Ann Nichols @GolfweekNichols · 25min In a total surprise move, JM Eagle CEO Walter Wang cal
item.description: Josh Carpenter reposteó Beth Ann Nichols @GolfweekNichols · 25min In a total surprise move, JM Eagle CEO Walter Wang called LPGA commissioner Craig Kessler moments before he went in the booth just to make sure he could up the purse by $1 million on the spot. No one knew! De LPGA 1 3 28 2 mil
